subject: WM-0064 review: changes_requested
body: High: obligation due queries still traverse unbounded non-matching debtor due rows while reporting only matching rows as visited, so metrics/caps understate actor-facing work; Medium: town-rule compliance cap is consumed before time-window filtering, so out-of-time rows in the same subject/region/trigger/action bucket can hide a later in-time rule. Prior trigger/action and exception-mask findings are fixed. Required checks and pnpm quality pass mechanically.
